form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after eight months 3rd in a small field at this track on March 26 over 1308m, 5 len behind Ciderhouse Way carrying 57kg at $8.30. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at this track on May 16 over 1408m, 0.5 len behind Pink Dinghy with 54.5kg at $3. Others offer greater appeal.
